title: selliguea heterocarpa
intro: Selliguea heterocarpa, also known as the Black Shieldfern or Pteris heterocarpa, is a species of fern native to tropical regions of the Pacific Islands and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selliguea heterocarpa can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, from respiratory problems to skin conditions.
